name: Oathbow
description: When you nock an arrow on this bow, it whispers in Elvish, 'Swift defeat to my enemies.' When you use this weapon to make a ranged attack, you can utter or sign the following command words: 'Swift death to you who have wronged me.' The target of your attack becomes your sworn enemy.

properties.activation_message: Whispers in Elvish: 'Swift defeat to my enemies'
properties.command_words: Swift death to you who have wronged me

sworn_enemy.duration: Until enemy dies or dawn 7 days later
sworn_enemy.renewal: Choose new one after next dawn when current dies

combat_benefits.advantage: Advantage on attack rolls against sworn enemy
combat_benefits.cover_bypass: Target gains no benefit from Half Cover or Three-Quarters Cover
combat_benefits.range_penalty: No Disadvantage due to long range

properties.penalty: Disadvantage on attack rolls with all other weapons while sworn enemy lives
